global_rules.aesthetic: Premium cinematic documentary feel inspired by Netflix title cards. Bold, energetic, highly polished. No photo of the person; text-only wordmark ARPITX. Cinematic grain/scanline overlays.
global_rules.testing_requirement: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid="hero-cta-button").

scale_rules.h1: text-5xl md:text-7xl lg:text-[8vw] uppercase tracking-tighter leading-none

typography.alignment: Strictly left-aligned or asymmetric editorial layouts. Avoid center-everything default.

layout_spacing.philosophy: Heavy negative space. Asymmetric editorial layouts. Orange knockout blocks.
layout_spacing.scale: Use Tailwind p-4, p-8, p-16, p-24, p-32. Containers with borders need internal p-8 to p-12.
layout_spacing.grid: Bento Grid Protocol. Avoid symmetric bootstrap columns. Use col-span offsets to create tension.

motion_interactions.scroll: Smooth scrolling (lenis mandatory). Scroll progress indicator in orange (#FF3D00).
motion_interactions.effects: Mouse-follow orange glow effect. Background film grain texture (CSS noise overlay).
motion_interactions.reveals: Text reveal animations (staggered letters/words). Section reveal on scroll (framer-motion).
motion_interactions.components: Magnetic buttons, smooth 60fps parallax, animated counters for stats.

buttons.primary: bg-[#FF3D00] text-white hover:bg-[#FFB800] transition-colors duration-300 rounded-none px-8 py-4 font-bold tracking-widest uppercase
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#FF3D00] text-[#FF3D00] hover:bg-[#FF3D00] hover:text-white transition-all duration-300 rounded-none px-8 py-4 uppercase

cards.glassmorphism: bg-[#111111]/80 backdrop-blur-md border border-[rgba(255,255,255,0.08)] rounded-none hover:border-[#FF3D00]/50 transition-all duration-500
cards.hover_state: Adds a subtle inset or outset orange glow box-shadow.

details.content: Wordmark ARPITX taking massive screen real estate. High contrast.
details.media: Floating YouTube video (https://youtu.be/UULJ3cp1pfo) with an electric orange (#FF3D00) accent frame. Auto-playing (simulated or actual embed with mute=1).
details.stats: Animated count-up stats. Values: '1' Documentary Published, '18' Years Old, Self-Taught (text), Premiere Pro + After Effects (text).
details.decorations: Mouse-follow orange glow, cinematic grain texture absolute overlay (pointer-events-none).

details.heading: FEATURED WORK
details.content: Embedded YouTube player inside a stylized container with a fullscreen lightbox trigger. Large cinematic typography overlapping the video frame.
details.layout: Overlapping layers. Dark background intersecting with surface2 blocks.

details.heading: SHORT FORM / REELS

items.description: Real Instagram Reel embed or stylized mock frame

details.styling: The placeholder cards must look like VHS tapes or raw film strips with red/orange tape labels. Grungy, editorial.

details.heading: ARSENAL / CAPABILITIES
details.styling: Glassmorphism cards with emoji icons. Hover triggers orange glow.

details.heading: THE PROTOCOL

steps.title: DISCOVERY
steps.desc: Aligning on vision, pacing, and assets.

details.styling: Numbered orange badges. Animated connecting line that fills with #FF3D00 on scroll.

details.heading: ENGAGEMENT TIERS
details.styling: Pro card must have glowing orange border and 'MOST POPULAR' badge. BlackOps font for prices.

details.heading: INTEL / FAQ

questions.q: What is your typical turnaround time?
questions.a: For standard short-form, 24-48 hours. For full documentaries, 1-2 weeks depending on scope.
Yes, tiers include specified revision rounds to ensure the final product matches your vision.
Adobe Premiere Pro for cutting, After Effects for motion graphics, and DaVinci Resolve for color.

questions.q: Can you source stock footage and music?
questions.a: Absolutely. I have access to premium libraries for cinematic b-roll and royalty-free scores.

questions.q: How do we transfer large video files?
questions.a: Google Drive, Frame.io, or Dropbox are preferred for raw asset handoffs.

questions.q: Do you edit gaming or vlog content?
questions.a: My specialty is high-end documentary and cinematic storytelling. Fast-paced vlogs and gaming highlights are considered on a case-by-case basis.

details.styling: Minimalist accordion. Active state reveals an electric orange left border and #FFB800 text.

details.heading: INITIATE TRANSMISSION

form.interaction: Orange tick success animation on simulated submit before mailto triggers.

details.styling: Massive text 'ARPITX' in footer background. Deep #050505 background for footer block.

images.usage: Use as a fixed background mix-blend-overlay or opacity-10 element to add grit.

images.description: Abstract warm orange and black gradient
images.usage: Use behind cards or text as a blurry ambient glow element.
